description: Strattec Security Corporation designs, develops, manufactures, and markets automotive security, access control, and user interface controls products in North America and internationally. The company offers mechanical and electronically enhanced locks and keys, fobs, passive entry passive start systems, digital key, phone as a key systems, steering column and instrument panel ignition lock housings, latches, power sliding door systems, power tailgate and lift gate systems, power deck lid systems, door handles, steering wheel switches and controller, E-shifters, paddle switches, and related prod
